title: DESIGN.md Console Atlas
summary: A formal token-specimen console that keeps the WordPress iframe dominant while Playground tools live in one compact drawer.
skillSource: awesome-design-md README: Vercel, Together AI, Replicate, Ollama descriptions and DESIGN.md token structures
flow: Iframe-first console with one specimen drawer for launcher, saved sites, manager tabs, exports, and reset confirmation.

title: Vercel Precision Runner
summary: A monochrome runner where launch, save, export, and logs read like deployment activity around a precise browser surface.
skillSource: awesome-design-md README: Vercel description plus Vercel DESIGN.md monochrome precision, Geist-like type, and hairline controls
flow: Single command strip and deployment-style activity rail; manager content swaps in the lower operations panel.

title: Linear Issue Board Recast
summary: A calm issue-workflow interface where saved Playgrounds are tasks and the active site has a property inspector.
skillSource: awesome-design-md README: Linear description plus Linear DESIGN.md dark surfaces, lavender accent, dense issue rhythm
flow: Saved sites behave as issues, the iframe is the selected issue, and one right inspector owns settings, files, blueprint, database, and logs.

title: Miro Canvas for Sites
summary: A spatial canvas prototype with yellow collaboration cues and a focused iframe that expands into the main board object.
skillSource: awesome-design-md README: Miro description plus Miro DESIGN.md yellow accent, canvas metaphor, and sticky-note palette
flow: Saved Playgrounds sit as canvas objects; choosing a route expands the live iframe while a board dock swaps launcher and manager tools.

title: IBM Carbon Lab Bench
summary: A structured lab bench with Carbon-like tables, square controls, accessible tabs, and strong destructive-state treatment.
skillSource: awesome-design-md README: IBM description plus IBM DESIGN.md Carbon palette, Plex typography, square components, data tables
flow: Enterprise bench layout: data tables select saved work, a dominant preview runs beside a tabbed lab manager and reset diff sheet.

title: High Variance Focus Split
summary: An asymmetric split workspace where the live iframe owns the stage and one command studio handles launch, manager, save, export, and reset.
flow: A smart-resize focus split: the interacted side expands while the single command studio swaps between launcher, manager, and status.

title: Minimalist Document Playground
summary: A warm document-style Playground where the iframe reads as the main page and settings, blueprint data, files, logs, and reset are inline blocks.
flow: A document workspace with one left page index that swaps between launch library, manager document, and runtime state.

title: Soft Agency Control Room
summary: A premium soft control room with a double-bezel live preview, fluid island controls, and one calm secondary surface for launch and management.
flow: A floating island toolbar controls the iframe while a single soft control room panel swaps between launch, manager, and runtime states.

title: Brutalist Runtime Switchboard
summary: A sharp mechanical Playground switchboard with a dominant iframe bay, dense command strips, red reset procedure, and one utility grid.
flow: A tactical switchboard: the iframe is the main bay and one utility grid flips between launcher, manager, and telemetry states.

title: Motion Bento Without Marketing
summary: An operational motion bento where alive panels show launch, manager, logs, reset, and exports while the live iframe remains the primary workspace.
flow: A live bento command surface surrounds a dominant iframe; one secondary panel swaps launcher, manager, and state without becoming a landing page.

title: Developer IDE OLED
summary: An OLED IDE workbench where the live WordPress iframe is the main editor and all Playground tools live in one inspector.
skillSource: UI Pro Max search: Developer Tool / IDE, Dark Mode (OLED), Developer Mono, Real-Time Monitor, Focus States
flow: A single command bar controls the iframe while a right inspector swaps between launcher, settings, files, blueprint, database, and logs.

title: Interactive Product Demo Shell
summary: A guided demo shell that walks from launch options to a running WordPress iframe while keeping management tools in one stage panel.
skillSource: UI Pro Max search: Interactive Product Demo, Productivity Tool, Tech Startup typography, Touch Target Size, Confirmation Messages
flow: A step rail frames Launch, Run, Manage, Export, and Reset while a single stage panel swaps feature content next to the dominant iframe.

title: Spatial UI Manager
summary: A spatial window manager where the WordPress iframe is the anchored canvas and one frosted control window changes roles.
skillSource: UI Pro Max search: Spatial UI (VisionOS), Glassmorphism contrast safeguards, Modern Dark Cinema, Adaptive Navigation
flow: A floating lens panel swaps manager modes over an iframe-first canvas, with explicit focus mode and high-contrast glass labels.

title: Accessible Ethical Playground
summary: A high-contrast Playground prototype with labeled controls, visible focus, large touch targets, and predictable manager navigation.
skillSource: UI Pro Max search: Accessible & Ethical, Focus States, Keyboard Navigation, Touch Target Size, Confirmation Dialogs
flow: One labeled top toolbar and one accessible tab panel expose launch, manager, data, export, and reset flows beside the iframe.

title: Data-Dense Monitor
summary: A real-time operations monitor where the WordPress iframe remains primary and every manager function is visible as compact data.
skillSource: UI Pro Max search: Real-Time Monitoring, Data-Dense Dashboard, Developer Tool / IDE, Developer Mono, Chart/Data accessibility
flow: A command bar and one monitor panel expose runtime, launch, settings, files, blueprint, database, logs, exports, and reset states.
